commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Crabbox wrapper, Crabbox/testing skills, and changelog so remote proof defaults to the repo `.crabbox.yaml` AWS provider while Blacksmith becomes explicit opt-in/fallback.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main hard-requires `blacksmith-testbox` support while `.crabbox.yaml` selects `aws`. I did not run Crabbox in this read-only review.
